GAMM model for Psychotic Risk prediction from SUbstance Use and other factors in CATSS

Silpa Soni Nallacheruvu

2026-04-01

Load the simulated Data

catss <- read_csv("catss_final_data.csv")
## Rows: 9261 Columns: 125
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr   (3): cmtwin, cmpair, batch
## dbl (122): SUD15_Cigarettes15, SUD15_Snuff15, SUD15_Alcohol15, SUD15_Cannabi...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.

Check complete cases

print(paste("Number of complete cases:", sum(complete.cases(catss))))
## [1] "Number of complete cases: 4033"

Create the CCA dataset

catss <- catss[complete.cases(catss), ]

Split the data into training and testing dataset

Based on their twin_id

test_size <- 0.25

# Get unique IDs
unique_ids <- unique(catss$cmpair)

# Sample test IDs
n_test <- floor(length(unique_ids) * test_size)
test_ids <- sample(unique_ids, size = n_test)

# Split dataset
test_df <- catss[catss$cmpair %in% test_ids, ]
train_df <- catss[!catss$cmpair %in% test_ids, ]

# Print summary
cat(sprintf(
  "Train: %d rows (%d IDs), Test: %d rows (%d IDs)\n",
  nrow(train_df), length(unique(train_df$cmpair)),
  nrow(test_df), length(unique(test_df$cmpair))
))
## Train: 3011 rows (2018 IDs), Test: 1022 rows (672 IDs)

Prepare the data for the model formula by creating interaction terms and factor variables

# get a list of columns with their prefix
SUD15_vars <- grep("^SUD15", names(catss), value = TRUE)
SCZ15_vars <- grep("^SCZ15", names(catss), value = TRUE)
PRS_vars <- grep("^PRS", names(catss), value = TRUE)
ADHD9_vars <- grep("^ADHD9", names(catss), value = TRUE)
ASD9_vars <- grep("^ASD9", names(catss), value = TRUE)
ACE_vars <- grep("^ACE", names(catss), value = TRUE)
SES_vars <- grep("^SES", names(catss), value = TRUE)
PCA_vars <- grep("^PC", names(catss), value = TRUE)[1:2]
Sex_var <- grep("^SEX", names(catss), value = TRUE)
Batch_var <- grep("^batch", names(catss), value = TRUE)[1]

covariate_terms <- paste(
  c(SUD15_vars, SCZ15_vars, ADHD9_vars, ASD9_vars, ACE_vars, SES_vars, paste0("s(", PRS_vars, ")"), Sex_var),
  collapse = " + "
)

# PCA terms according to the genetic batch
genetic_confounding_terms <- paste(
  c(
    paste0("factor(", Batch_var, ") : ", PCA_vars)
  ),
  collapse = " + "
)

# create interaction terms between SUD15 variables and all other covariates
interaction_terms <- paste(
  c(
    paste0(SUD15_vars ,":", SCZ15_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", ADHD9_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", ASD9_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", ACE_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", SES_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", PRS_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", Sex_var)
  ),
  collapse = " + "
)

train_df$cmpair <- as.factor(train_df$cmpair)

Fit the GAMM model

Fit the Positive GAMM model

pos_gamm_formula_str <- paste(
  "SCZ18_Pos_Norm ~",
  covariate_terms, "+",
  genetic_confounding_terms, "+",
  interaction_terms, "+",
  "s(cmpair, bs='re')"
)

pos_gamm_formula <- as.formula(pos_gamm_formula_str)

pos_gamm_model <- gam(
  pos_gamm_formula,
  data = train_df,
  family = gaussian(),
  method = "REML"
)

summary(pos_gamm_model)
## 
## Family: gaussian 
## Link function: identity 
## 
## Formula:
## SCZ18_Pos_Norm ~ SUD15_Cigarettes15 + SUD15_Snuff15 + SUD15_Alcohol15 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15 + SUD15_OtherDrugs15 + 
##     SCZ15_Spied15 + SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15 + SCZ15_Special_messages15 + 
##     SCZ15_Special_powers15 + SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15 + 
##     SCZ15_Read_others_minds15 + SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15 + 
##     SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 + SCZ15_Irritable15 + SCZ15_Unrealistic_abilities15 + 
##     SCZ15_Not_tired15 + SCZ15_Too_much_energy15 + SCZ15_Racing_thoughts15 + 
##     SCZ15_Talking_fast15 + SCZ15_Sexual_inappropriate15 + SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 + 
##     SCZ15_Hear_voices15 + SCZ15_headaches15 + SCZ15_worry15 + 
##     SCZ15_unhappy15 + SCZ15_lose_confidence15 + SCZ15_easily_scared15 + 
##     SCZ15_PROD_seen_hallucinations9 + ADHD9_fail_close_attention9 + 
##     ADHD9_difficulty_with_attention9 + ADHD9_not_listening9 + 
##     ADHD9_difficulty_following_instructions9 + ADHD9_difficulty_organizing_tasks9 + 
##     ADHD9_avoid_mental_effort_tasks9 + ADHD9_often_lose_things9 + 
##     ADHD9_easily_distracted9 + ADHD9_often_forgetful9 + ADHD9_difficulty_hold_still9 + 
##     ADHD9_often_move9 + ADHD9_often_run9 + ADHD9_difficulty_calm9 + 
##     ADHD9_often_motor9 + ADHD9_talk_excess9 + ADHD9_often_blurt_out9 + 
##     ADHD9_difficulty_waiting9 + ADHD9_often_interrupt9 + ADHD9_easily_bored9 + 
##     ASD9_delay_language9 + ASD9_difficulty_converse9 + ASD9_repeat_words9 + 
##     ASD9_difficulty_pretend_play9 + ASD9_talk_too_high_low9 + 
##     ASD9_difficulty_on_track9 + ASD9_difficulty_express9 + ASD9_difficulty_socialize9 + 
##     ASD9_uninterested_sharing9 + ASD9_own_terms9 + ASD9_difficulty_expect_behavior9 + 
##     ASD9_easily_influenced9 + ASD9_absorbed_own9 + ASD9_absorbed_problems9 + 
##     ASD9_strange_movements9 + ASD9_absorbed_details9 + ASD9_dislike_change9 + 
##     ACE15_bullied_often15 + ACE15_tease_bullying15 + ACE15_emotional_bullying15 + 
##     ACE15_rumours_bullying15 + ACE15_bullying_by_num15 + ACE15_bullying_time15 + 
##     ACE18_emotional_abuse18 + ACE18_witness_crime18 + ACE18_hate_crime18 + 
##     ACE15_other_bullying15 + ACE18_other_abuse18 + SES_birth_country_mother + 
##     SES_education_mother + SES_birth_country_father + SES_education_father + 
##     s(PRS_Amygdala_excitatory) + s(PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory) + 
##     s(PRS_CGE_interneuron) + s(PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic) + 
##     s(PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha) + s(PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu) + 
##     s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3) + s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA4) + s(PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus) + 
##     s(PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier) + s(PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron) + 
##     s(PRS_MGE_interneuron) + s(PRS_Miscellaneous) + s(PRS_Thalamic_excitatory) + 
##     s(PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph) + s(PRS_all) + SEX + factor(batch):PC1 + 
##     factor(batch):PC2 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:SCZ15_Spied15 + SUD15_Snuff15:SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15 + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:SCZ15_Special_messages15 + SUD15_Cannabis15:SCZ15_Special_powers15 + 
##     SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SCZ15_Read_others_minds15 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 + SUD15_Alcohol15:SCZ15_Irritable15 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:SCZ15_Unrealistic_abilities15 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SCZ15_Not_tired15 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SCZ15_Too_much_energy15 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:SCZ15_Racing_thoughts15 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:SCZ15_Talking_fast15 + SUD15_Alcohol15:SCZ15_Sexual_inappropriate15 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SCZ15_Hear_voices15 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SCZ15_headaches15 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:SCZ15_worry15 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:SCZ15_unhappy15 + SUD15_Alcohol15:SCZ15_lose_confidence15 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:SCZ15_easily_scared15 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SCZ15_PROD_seen_hallucinations9 + 
##     SUD15_Cigarettes15:ADHD9_fail_close_attention9 + SUD15_Snuff15:ADHD9_difficulty_with_attention9 + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:ADHD9_not_listening9 + SUD15_Cannabis15:ADHD9_difficulty_following_instructions9 + 
##     SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ADHD9_difficulty_organizing_tasks9 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:ADHD9_avoid_mental_effort_tasks9 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:ADHD9_often_lose_things9 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:ADHD9_easily_distracted9 + SUD15_Alcohol15:ADHD9_often_forgetful9 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:ADHD9_difficulty_hold_still9 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ADHD9_often_move9 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:ADHD9_often_run9 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:ADHD9_difficulty_calm9 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:ADHD9_often_motor9 + SUD15_Alcohol15:ADHD9_talk_excess9 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:ADHD9_often_blurt_out9 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ADHD9_difficulty_waiting9 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:ADHD9_often_interrupt9 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:ADHD9_easily_bored9 + 
##     SUD15_Cigarettes15:ASD9_delay_language9 + SUD15_Snuff15:ASD9_difficulty_converse9 + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:ASD9_repeat_words9 + SUD15_Cannabis15:ASD9_difficulty_pretend_play9 + 
##     SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ASD9_talk_too_high_low9 + SUD15_OtherDrugs15:ASD9_difficulty_on_track9 + 
##     SUD15_Cigarettes15:ASD9_difficulty_express9 + SUD15_Snuff15:ASD9_difficulty_socialize9 + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:ASD9_uninterested_sharing9 + SUD15_Cannabis15:ASD9_own_terms9 + 
##     SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ASD9_difficulty_expect_behavior9 + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:ASD9_easily_influenced9 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:ASD9_absorbed_own9 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:ASD9_absorbed_problems9 + SUD15_Alcohol15:ASD9_strange_movements9 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:ASD9_absorbed_details9 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ASD9_dislike_change9 + 
##     SUD15_Cigarettes15:ACE15_bullied_often15 + SUD15_Snuff15:ACE15_tease_bullying15 + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:ACE15_emotional_bullying15 + SUD15_Cannabis15:ACE15_rumours_bullying15 + 
##     SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ACE15_bullying_by_num15 + SUD15_OtherDrugs15:ACE15_bullying_time15 + 
##     SUD15_Cigarettes15:ACE18_emotional_abuse18 + SUD15_Snuff15:ACE18_witness_crime18 + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:ACE18_hate_crime18 + SUD15_Cannabis15:ACE15_other_bullying15 + 
##     SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ACE18_other_abuse18 + SUD15_Cigarettes15:SES_birth_country_mother + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:SES_education_mother + SUD15_Alcohol15:SES_birth_country_father + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:SES_education_father + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SES_birth_country_mother + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SES_education_mother + SUD15_Cigarettes15:PRS_Amygdala_excitatory + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory + SUD15_Alcohol15:PRS_CGE_interneuron + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu + SUD15_Cigarettes15:PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3 + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:PRS_Hippocampal_CA4 + SUD15_Alcohol15:PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:PRS_MGE_interneuron + SUD15_Cigarettes15:PRS_Miscellaneous + 
##     SUD15_Snuff15:PRS_Thalamic_excitatory + SUD15_Alcohol15:PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15:PRS_all + SUD15_Cigarettes15:SEX + SUD15_Snuff15:SEX + 
##     SUD15_Alcohol15:SEX + SUD15_Cannabis15:SEX + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SEX + 
##     SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SEX + s(cmpair, bs = "re")

## SUD15_Snuff15:ASD9_absorbed_problems9                           -0.0257330
## SUD15_Alcohol15:ASD9_strange_movements9                         -0.0019402
## SUD15_Cannabis15:ASD9_absorbed_details9                          0.0406189
## SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:ASD9_dislike_change9                -0.0169914
## SUD15_Cigarettes15:ACE15_bullied_often15                         0.0051924
## SUD15_Snuff15:ACE15_tease_bullying15                            -0.0079053
## SUD15_Alcohol15:ACE15_emotional_bullying15                      -0.0088201
## SUD15_Cannabis15:ACE15_rumours_bullying15                        0.0082411

## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:

## s(PRS_Amygdala_excitatory)          1.000    1.000 1.636  0.2010    
## s(PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory)        2.852    3.529 0.647  0.4764    
## s(PRS_CGE_interneuron)              2.006    2.489 2.908  0.0562 .  
## s(PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic)   1.069    1.124 1.130  0.2619    
## s(PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha)   1.000    1.000 0.286  0.5928    
## s(PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu)   2.067    2.563 0.846  0.4455    
## s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3)            2.598    3.234 2.190  0.0818 .  
## s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA4)              1.420    1.689 0.269  0.7715    
## s(PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus)    1.000    1.000 0.024  0.8765    
## s(PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier)    1.001    1.002 0.065  0.8004    
## s(PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron)          1.099    1.175 0.144  0.8487    
## s(PRS_MGE_interneuron)              1.001    1.001 0.530  0.4666    
## s(PRS_Miscellaneous)                1.000    1.000 0.448  0.5036    
## s(PRS_Thalamic_excitatory)          1.000    1.001 0.992  0.3194    
## s(PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph)   1.000    1.000 1.702  0.1922    
## s(PRS_all)                          1.000    1.001 4.013  0.0452 *  
## s(cmpair)                         348.250 2012.000 0.216  <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Rank: 2347/2348
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.361   Deviance explained = 47.9%
## -REML = -2373.8  Scale est. = 0.0064901  n = 3011

View significance

param_coefs <- as.data.frame(summary(pos_gamm_model)$p.table)

smooth_coefs <- as.data.frame(summary(pos_gamm_model)$s.table)

# Prepare clean table
pos_coefs_table <- param_coefs %>%
  mutate(Variable = rownames(.)) %>%
  rename(p_value = `Pr(>|t|)`) %>%
  mutate(significance = cut(
    p_value,
    breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, Inf),
    labels = c("***", "**", "*", ".", "")
  )) %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05, Variable != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  select(Estimate, `Std. Error`, p_value, significance) %>%
  mutate(
    Estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
    `Std. Error` = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 3)
  )

kable(pos_coefs_table, format = "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Estimate Std. Error p_value significance
ACE18_emotional_abuse18 -0.038 0.004 0.00e+00 ***

SUD15_Alcohol15:SCZ15_Special_messages15 -0.017 0.007 1.35e-02

SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 0.009 0.004 1.79e-02
SUD15_Snuff15:SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 -0.007 0.003 1.83e-02
SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15 -0.014 0.006 1.84e-02
SCZ15_Spied15 0.007 0.003 2.15e-02
SUD15_Alcohol15:PRS_CGE_interneuron 0.034 0.016 2.81e-02
SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15 -0.343 0.158 3.00e-02
ASD9_easily_influenced9 0.008 0.004 4.61e-02

Check the twin random effect

plot(pos_gamm_model, select = 17, main = "Random Effect of Twin ID in Positive GAMM Model")

Evaluate the model predictions

pos_gamm_y_pred <- predict(pos_gamm_model, newdata = test_df, type = "response")
## Warning in predict.gam(pos_gamm_model, newdata = test_df, type = "response"):
## factor levels cm352436, cm352447, cm352499, cm352784, cm353319, cm353795,
## cm354487, cm354775, cm354815, cm354834, cm355394, cm355536, cm355825, cm356711,
## cm356939, cm357007, cm357285, cm357676, cm357907, cm358069, cm358205, cm358453,

## cm367007, cm367070, cm367534, cm367549, cm367669, cm367965, cm368291, cm368721,
## cm369288, cm369311, cm369789, cm369900, cm369936, cm369942, cm370131, cm370299,
## cm370354, cm370364, cm370398, cm370991, cm371194, cm371241, cm371243, cm371258,

## cm456738, cm456788, cm457209, cm457608, cm458396, cm458465, cm458562, cm458627,
## cm459124, cm459450, cm459737, cm459881, cm460078, cm460088, cm460560, cm460575,
## cm460843, cm461115, cm461200, cm461323, cm461376, cm461385, cm461416, cm461712,
## cm461837, cm462117, cm462276, cm462568, cm462972, cm463641, cm463664, cm464011,

## cm466242, cm466432, cm466628, cm466781, cm466919, cm466941, cm466944, cm466994,
## cm467060, cm467150, cm467373, cm467473, cm467688, cm467735, cm467913, cm467915,
## cm467962, cm468106, cm468498, cm468626, cm468662, cm468927, cm469232, cm469302,
## cm469724, cm470159, cm470311, cm470590, cm470862, cm471478, cm471724, cm472268,
## cm472850, cm473053, cm473152, cm473269, cm473463, cm473771, cm473902, cm474049,
## cm474343, cm474347, cm474370, cm474605, cm475459, cm475549, cm475738, cm476046,
## cm476162, cm476968, cm477192, cm477459, cm477799, cm478523, cm478950, cm479271,
## cm479348, cm479630, cm480123, cm480176, cm480379, cm480417, cm480888, cm480996,
## cm481383, cm481599, cm481624, cm481897, cm481981, cm482487, cm482880, cm483061,
## cm483104, cm483276, cm483438, cm483498, cm483643, cm483701, cm483820, cm484019,
## cm484328, cm484336, cm485056, cm485086, cm485176, cm485228, cm485602, cm485792,
## cm485949, cm486138, cm486271, cm486338, cm486346, cm486527, cm486555, cm486640,
## cm486928, cm487009, cm487142, cm487551, cm487560, cm487623, cm487741, cm488106,
## cm488189, cm488637, cm488707, cm488839, cm488994, cm489051, cm489216, cm489453,
## cm489970, cm490100, cm490191, cm490490, cm490587, cm490761, cm491250, cm491538,
## cm491711, cm491960, cm492002, cm492633, cm492787, cm493264, cm493372, cm493750,
## cm494086, cm494228, cm494347, cm494386, cm494459, cm494597, cm494930, cm494944,
## cm495148, cm495486, cm495521, cm495638, cm495749, cm496227, cm496403, cm496520,
## cm496578, cm496682, cm496886, cm497795, cm497833, cm498207, cm498633, cm498715,
## cm498786, cm499346, cm500059, cm500246, cm500340, cm500506, cm500513, cm500667,
## cm500908, cm501053, cm501064, cm501067, cm501107, cm502310, cm502318, cm502321,
## cm502506, cm502531, cm503139, cm503314, cm503561, cm503734, cm503740, cm503787,
## cm503797, cm503798, cm504039, cm504279, cm504491, cm504532, cm504675, cm504941,
## cm505465, cm505725, cm505816, cm506047, cm506080, cm506158, cm506239, cm506249,
## cm506253, cm506265, cm506266, cm506331, cm506908, cm506919, cm507194, cm507270,
## cm507836, cm508001, cm508573, cm508806, cm509406, cm509469, cm509473, cm509806,
## cm509868, cm510123 not in original fit
pos_y_true <- test_df$SCZ18_Pos_Norm

# Create dataframe
pos_gamm_df <- data.frame(
  actual = pos_y_true,
  predicted = pos_gamm_y_pred
)

# Residuals
pos_gamm_df$residuals <- pos_gamm_df$actual - pos_gamm_df$predicted

# Metrics
r2 <- cor(pos_gamm_df$actual, pos_gamm_df$predicted)^2
mae <- mean(abs(pos_gamm_df$actual - pos_gamm_df$predicted))
pearson_r <- cor(pos_gamm_df$actual, pos_gamm_df$predicted)
spearman_r <- cor(pos_gamm_df$actual, pos_gamm_df$predicted, method = "spearman")

metrics_text <- sprintf(
  "R² = %.4f\nMAE = %.4f\nSpearman rho = %.4f\nPearson R = %.4f",
  r2, mae, spearman_r, pearson_r
)

# predicted vs actual plot
p1 <- ggplot(pos_gamm_df, aes(x = actual, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#2C7FB8") +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = max(pos_gamm_df$actual) * 0.6,
           y = max(pos_gamm_df$predicted) * 0.1,   # move inside plot
           label = metrics_text,
           hjust = 0,
           size = 4) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +  # prevents clipping
  
  labs(
    title = "Positive GAMM Model - Predicted vs Actual (Test set)",
    x = "Actual Values",
    y = "Predicted Values"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 40, 10, 10))  # extra space

p1 
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# residual plot
p2 <- ggplot(pos_gamm_df, aes(x = predicted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#74A9CF") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Positive GAMM Model - Residual Plot (Test set)",
    x = "Predicted Values",
    y = "Residuals (Actual - Predicted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2

Fit the Negative GAMM model

neg_gamm_formula_str <- paste(
  "SCZ18_Neg_Norm ~",
  covariate_terms, "+",
  genetic_confounding_terms, "+",
  interaction_terms, "+",
  "s(cmpair, bs='re')"
)

neg_gamm_formula <- as.formula(neg_gamm_formula_str)

neg_gamm_model <- gam(
  neg_gamm_formula,
  data = train_df,
  family = gaussian(),
  method = "REML"
)

summary(neg_gamm_model)
## 
## Family: gaussian 
## Link function: identity 
## 
## Formula:
## SCZ18_Neg_Norm ~ SUD15_Cigarettes15 + SUD15_Snuff15 + SUD15_Alcohol15 + 
##     SUD15_Cannabis15 + SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15 + SUD15_OtherDrugs15 + 
##     SCZ15_Spied15 + SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15 + SCZ15_Special_messages15 + 
##     SCZ15_Special_powers15 + SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15 + 
##     SCZ15_Read_others_minds15 + SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15 + 
##     SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 + SCZ15_Irritable15 + SCZ15_Unrealistic_abilities15 + 
##     SCZ15_Not_tired15 + SCZ15_Too_much_energy15 + SCZ15_Racing_thoughts15 + 
##     SCZ15_Talking_fast15 + SCZ15_Sexual_inappropriate15 + SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 + 
##     SCZ15_Hear_voices15 + SCZ15_headaches15 + SCZ15_worry15 + 
##     SCZ15_unhappy15 + SCZ15_lose_confidence15 + SCZ15_easily_scared15 + 
##     SCZ15_PROD_seen_hallucinations9 + ADHD9_fail_close_attention9 + 
##     ADHD9_difficulty_with_attention9 + ADHD9_not_listening9 + 
##     ADHD9_difficulty_following_instructions9 + ADHD9_difficulty_organizing_tasks9 + 
##     ADHD9_avoid_mental_effort_tasks9 + ADHD9_often_lose_things9 + 
##     ADHD9_easily_distracted9 + ADHD9_often_forgetful9 + ADHD9_difficulty_hold_still9 + 
##     ADHD9_often_move9 + ADHD9_often_run9 + ADHD9_difficulty_calm9 + 
##     ADHD9_often_motor9 + ADHD9_talk_excess9 + ADHD9_often_blurt_out9 + 
##     ADHD9_difficulty_waiting9 + ADHD9_often_interrupt9 + ADHD9_easily_bored9 + 
##     ASD9_delay_language9 + ASD9_difficulty_converse9 + ASD9_repeat_words9 + 
##     ASD9_difficulty_pretend_play9 + ASD9_talk_too_high_low9 + 
##     ASD9_difficulty_on_track9 + ASD9_difficulty_express9 + ASD9_difficulty_socialize9 + 
##     ASD9_uninterested_sharing9 + ASD9_own_terms9 + ASD9_difficulty_expect_behavior9 + 
##     ASD9_easily_influenced9 + ASD9_absorbed_own9 + ASD9_absorbed_problems9 + 
##     ASD9_strange_movements9 + ASD9_absorbed_details9 + ASD9_dislike_change9 +

##     s(PRS_CGE_interneuron) + s(PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic) + 
##     s(PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha) + s(PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu) + 
##     s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3) + s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA4) + s(PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus) +

## SUD15_Cigarettes15:PRS_Miscellaneous                            0.740689    
## SUD15_Snuff15:PRS_Thalamic_excitatory                           0.603515    
## SUD15_Alcohol15:PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph                  0.041309 *  
## SUD15_Cannabis15:PRS_all                                        0.352906    
## SUD15_Cigarettes15:SEX                                          0.679070    
## SUD15_Snuff15:SEX                                               0.781997    
## SUD15_Alcohol15:SEX                                             0.502127    
## SUD15_Cannabis15:SEX                                            0.803389    
## SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15:SEX                                 0.834415    
## SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SEX                                          0.354718    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##                                       edf   Ref.df     F p-value    
## s(PRS_Amygdala_excitatory)          1.000    1.000 0.030  0.8621    
## s(PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory)        2.100    2.596 2.182  0.0755 .  
## s(PRS_CGE_interneuron)              2.667    3.296 1.431  0.2003    
## s(PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic)   1.000    1.000 0.223  0.6369    
## s(PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha)   2.087    2.582 1.010  0.3197    
## s(PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu)   1.000    1.000 1.353  0.2449    
## s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3)            1.000    1.000 0.215  0.6430    
## s(PRS_Hippocampal_CA4)              1.712    2.093 1.216  0.3117    
## s(PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus)    1.519    1.833 0.546  0.6401    
## s(PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier)    1.000    1.000 0.279  0.5977    
## s(PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron)          1.000    1.000 0.970  0.3248    
## s(PRS_MGE_interneuron)              1.000    1.000 0.272  0.6019    
## s(PRS_Miscellaneous)                1.000    1.000 0.309  0.5785    
## s(PRS_Thalamic_excitatory)          2.250    2.793 1.249  0.3365    
## s(PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph)   1.000    1.000 3.496  0.0616 .  
## s(PRS_all)                          1.000    1.000 6.499  0.0109 *  
## s(cmpair)                         385.150 2012.000 0.244  <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Rank: 2347/2348
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.378   Deviance explained =   50%
## -REML = -813.82  Scale est. = 0.019384  n = 3011

View significance

param_coefs <- as.data.frame(summary(neg_gamm_model)$p.table)

smooth_coefs <- as.data.frame(summary(neg_gamm_model)$s.table)

# Prepare clean table
neg_coefs_table <- param_coefs %>%
  mutate(Variable = rownames(.)) %>%
  rename(p_value = `Pr(>|t|)`) %>%
  mutate(significance = cut(
    p_value,
    breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, Inf),
    labels = c("***", "**", "*", ".", "")
  )) %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05, Variable != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  select(Estimate, `Std. Error`, p_value, significance) %>%
  mutate(
    Estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
    `Std. Error` = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 3)
  )

kable(neg_coefs_table, format = "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Estimate Std. Error p_value significance

SUD15_OtherDrugs15:SCZ15_headaches15 0.027 0.012 0.031700
factor(batch)GSA3:PC2 2.270 1.096 0.038500
SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 0.014 0.007 0.039600
ACE15_emotional_bullying15 0.047 0.023 0.040200
SUD15_Alcohol15:PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph 0.058 0.029 0.041300
SCZ15_Special_powers15 -0.022 0.011 0.044200
factor(batch)GSA1:PC1 0.862 0.435 0.047400

Check the twin random effect

plot(neg_gamm_model, select = 17, main = "Random Effect of Twin ID in Negative GAMM Model")

Evaluate the model predictions

neg_gamm_y_pred <- predict(neg_gamm_model, newdata = test_df, type = "response")
## Warning in predict.gam(neg_gamm_model, newdata = test_df, type = "response"):

## cm469724, cm470159, cm470311, cm470590, cm470862, cm471478, cm471724, cm472268,
## cm472850, cm473053, cm473152, cm473269, cm473463, cm473771, cm473902, cm474049,
## cm474343, cm474347, cm474370, cm474605, cm475459, cm475549, cm475738, cm476046,
## cm476162, cm476968, cm477192, cm477459, cm477799, cm478523, cm478950, cm479271,
## cm479348, cm479630, cm480123, cm480176, cm480379, cm480417, cm480888, cm480996,
## cm481383, cm481599, cm481624, cm481897, cm481981, cm482487, cm482880, cm483061,
## cm483104, cm483276, cm483438, cm483498, cm483643, cm483701, cm483820, cm484019,
## cm484328, cm484336, cm485056, cm485086, cm485176, cm485228, cm485602, cm485792,
## cm485949, cm486138, cm486271, cm486338, cm486346, cm486527, cm486555, cm486640,
## cm486928, cm487009, cm487142, cm487551, cm487560, cm487623, cm487741, cm488106,
## cm488189, cm488637, cm488707, cm488839, cm488994, cm489051, cm489216, cm489453,
## cm489970, cm490100, cm490191, cm490490, cm490587, cm490761, cm491250, cm491538,
## cm491711, cm491960, cm492002, cm492633, cm492787, cm493264, cm493372, cm493750,
## cm494086, cm494228, cm494347, cm494386, cm494459, cm494597, cm494930, cm494944,
## cm495148, cm495486, cm495521, cm495638, cm495749, cm496227, cm496403, cm496520,
## cm496578, cm496682, cm496886, cm497795, cm497833, cm498207, cm498633, cm498715,
## cm498786, cm499346, cm500059, cm500246, cm500340, cm500506, cm500513, cm500667,
## cm500908, cm501053, cm501064, cm501067, cm501107, cm502310, cm502318, cm502321,
## cm502506, cm502531, cm503139, cm503314, cm503561, cm503734, cm503740, cm503787,
## cm503797, cm503798, cm504039, cm504279, cm504491, cm504532, cm504675, cm504941,
## cm505465, cm505725, cm505816, cm506047, cm506080, cm506158, cm506239, cm506249,
## cm506253, cm506265, cm506266, cm506331, cm506908, cm506919, cm507194, cm507270,
## cm507836, cm508001, cm508573, cm508806, cm509406, cm509469, cm509473, cm509806,
## cm509868, cm510123 not in original fit
neg_y_true <- test_df$SCZ18_Neg_Norm

# Create data frame
neg_gamm_df <- data.frame(
  actual = neg_y_true,
  predicted = neg_gamm_y_pred
)

# Residuals
neg_gamm_df$residuals <- neg_gamm_df$actual - neg_gamm_df$predicted

# Metrics
r2 <- cor(neg_gamm_df$actual, neg_gamm_df$predicted)^2
mae <- mean(abs(neg_gamm_df$actual - neg_gamm_df$predicted))
pearson_r <- cor(neg_gamm_df$actual, neg_gamm_df$predicted)
spearman_r <- cor(neg_gamm_df$actual, neg_gamm_df$predicted, method = "spearman")

metrics_text <- sprintf(
  "R² = %.4f\nMAE = %.4f\nSpearman rho = %.4f\nPearson R = %.4f",
  r2, mae, spearman_r, pearson_r
)

# predicted vs actual plot
p1 <- ggplot(neg_gamm_df, aes(x = actual, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#2C7FB8") +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = max(neg_gamm_df$actual) * 0.6,
           y = max(neg_gamm_df$predicted) * 0.1,   # move inside plot
           label = metrics_text,
           hjust = 0,
           size = 4) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +  # prevents clipping
  
  labs(
    title = "Negative GAMM Model - Predicted vs Actual (Test set)",
    x = "Actual Values",
    y = "Predicted Values"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 40, 10, 10))  # extra space

p1
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# residual plot
p2 <- ggplot(neg_gamm_df, aes(x = predicted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#74A9CF") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Negative GAMM Model - Residual Plot (Test set)",
    x = "Predicted Values",
    y = "Residuals (Actual - Predicted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2
